paiseKiPathshala.name: Paise Ki Pathshala
paiseKiPathshala.description: Sister financial literacy brand by the same team. Educates Indian MSMEs and families on money, tax, insurance, and investment. Cross-sell for customers who want financial literacy content.

digitalHub.name: TCC Digital Hub
digitalHub.description: Client dashboard for compliance calendar, document vault, notices, reports, and filings status. Direct all existing clients here for their filings.

gst.a: 11th of the following month for monthly filers. QRMP IFF is 13th of the month following each of the first two months of a quarter.
20th of the following month for monthly filers. QRMP filers file on 22nd or 24th depending on state group.
Due 31st December of the next financial year. Mandatory when turnover exceeds Rs 2 crore. GSTR-9C (self-certified reconciliation) applies above Rs 5 crore.
Rs 50 per day of delay (Rs 20 per day for nil return), capped. Interest at 18% per annum on tax liability.
Input Tax Credit is the GST paid on purchases that a registered business can offset against GST collected on sales, subject to matching with GSTR-2B and supplier compliance.

incomeTax.q: Which ITR form applies to me?
incomeTax.a: ITR-1 Sahaj for resident individuals with salary or one house and income up to Rs 50 lakh. ITR-2 for capital gains or more than one house. ITR-3 for business or profession. ITR-4 Sugam for presumptive 44AD/44ADA/44AE. ITR-5/6/7 for firms and LLPs, companies, and trusts respectively.
Section 44AB applies when business turnover exceeds Rs 1 crore (Rs 10 crore if cash receipts and payments are under 5%), or professional receipts exceed Rs 50 lakh.

tds.a: Q1 by 31 July, Q2 by 31 October, Q3 by 31 January, Q4 by 31 May.
By 15 June following the financial year end.

roc.a: AOC-4 within 30 days of AGM, MGT-7 within 60 days of AGM, DIR-3 KYC by 30 September each year.
Form 8 (Statement of Accounts) by 30 October, Form 11 (Annual Return) by 30 May.

msme.a: Free online registration at udyamregistration.gov.in using Aadhaar and PAN. Entitles MSMEs to priority sector lending, subsidies, and delayed-payment protection.
DPIIT recognition gives 3-year tax holiday u/s 80-IAC, angel tax relief, self-certification on labour/environment laws, and access to Fund of Funds.

other.a: State-specific tax on income from profession or employment. Applicable in Maharashtra, Karnataka, West Bengal, Gujarat, Tamil Nadu and others. Slab rates and due dates vary by state.
State-level registration required for commercial premises. Governs working hours, holidays, and worker welfare. Typically renewed annually or periodically.
Required for food business. Basic (turnover up to Rs 12 lakh), State (up to Rs 20 crore), Central (above Rs 20 crore or import/export).

leadCapture.confirmation: Dhanyavaad. Humari team aapko WhatsApp par +91 93521 15498 se next business hour mein contact karegi.

appointment.confirmation: Aapki appointment confirm karne ke liye WhatsApp par message bhej dein. Hum time slot reserve kar denge.

outOfScope.decline: Yeh query TCC ke scope mein nahi aati. Main sirf compliance, taxation, aur digital marketing par madad kar sakti hoon. Kya aap apna naam aur phone share karein, hum aapko sahi team se connect karwa denge?

digitalHubRedirect.reply: Aapki filings, documents aur compliance calendar TCC Digital Hub par milenge: https://tcc-digital-hub.netlify.app/app-prototype/
